privileged_info_summary: All metadata claims are accurate. The task generates synthetic data using python-docx to create an article about Miyawaki forests titled 'The Micro-Forest Revolution' by Elena Rostova. The source document is created as /home/ga/Documents/article_draft.odt and must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/article_layout.odt. The pull quote 'These tiny ecosystems can lower urban temperatures by up to 4 degrees.' must be extracted from the document's third paragraph and placed in a text box with page wrapping. The document requires two-column layout for body text and a 3-line drop cap on the first paragraph.
